events.title: Explosion — Strait of Hormuz
events.description: On 2026-03-12, a Explosion targeted Two foreign vessels in Strait of Hormuz, resulting in 0 casualties.

events.title: Air Strike — Beirut’s Ramlet al-Baida seafront, Lebanon
events.description: On 2026-03-12, a Air Strike targeted Displaced persons near Beirut seafront in Beirut’s Ramlet al-Baida seafront, Lebanon, resulting in 8 casualties.

events.title: Missile/Drone Attack — Bahrain (fuel tanks)
events.description: On 2026-03-12, a Missile/Drone Attack targeted Fuel tanks in Bahrain (fuel tanks), resulting in 0 casualties.

events.title: Missile/Drone Attack — Saudi Arabia (oilfield)
events.description: On 2026-03-12, a Missile/Drone Attack targeted Oilfield in Saudi Arabia (oilfield), resulting in 0 casualties.

events.title: Explosive-laden boat attack — Iraqi waters (off the coast)
events.description: On 2026-03-12, a Explosive-laden boat attack targeted Two oil tankers in Iraqi waters (off the coast), resulting in 1 casualties.

events.title: Air Strike — Al-Ansar refugee camp, Gaza
events.description: On 2026-03-12, a Air Strike targeted Tents sheltering displaced Palestinians in Al-Ansar refugee camp, Gaza, resulting in 0 casualties.

events.title: Bombing — Iran (Shajareh Tayyebeh Elementary School)
events.description: On 2026-03-12, a Bombing targeted Shajareh Tayyebeh Elementary School in Iran (Shajareh Tayyebeh Elementary School), resulting in 170 casualties.

events.title: Oil prices rise 6% and trade above $97.5 a barrel
Dubai authorities are responding to a minor incident caused by debris from a successful interception that fell onto the façade of a building on Sheikh Zayed Road. No injuries were reported
UAE air defenses intercept 6 ballistic missiles, 7 cruise missiles, and 39 drones
Dubai authorities are responding to a minor drone incident in the Al Bada’a area. No injuries have been reported
Sounds of interception heard in response to aerial threats over Manama
Iranian media: Air base in Shiraz, southern Iran, targeted twice this morning
New drones raid reported in Dubai
AFP: Explosions heard in downtown Dubai
Saudi Arabia Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: A drone was intercepted and destroyed in the Empty Quarter, heading towards the Shaybah oil field.
The Shiraz airbase was bombed a short while ago.
Kuwait News Agency: Firefighters brought under control a fire that broke out in a residential building in the south of the country after it was targeted by a drone.
Bahrain says fuel tanks attacked, requests residents stay home
Dubai Media Office: Civil Defense controls minor fire that broke out in a building after a drone attack; no injuries reported.
Another drone strike reported in Al Jadaf district of Dubai
Iranian television: US oil tanker targeted near Umm Qasr port in Basra, southern Iraq, by a remote-controlled speedboat
Iraqi ports: 31 people rescued, search continues for those missing after attack on two oil tankers
Reuters, citing Iraqi officials: Foreign crew member killed in attack on two fuel tankers
Authorities in Dubai are currently dealing with an incident involving a drone crashing into a building in the Dubai Creek Harbour area.
Saudi Ministry of Defense: Drone intercepted and destroyed in the Eastern Province
Reuters: A preliminary investigation by Iraqi security authorities confirms that Iranian boats loaded with explosives collided with two fuel tankers in Iraqi waters.
Kuwaiti Army: Air defenses are currently intercepting missile and drone attacks
An Iraqi official told Reuters that 25 crew members from two ships attacked in Iraqi territorial waters have been evacuated.
An Iraqi official told Reuters that two foreign tankers carrying Iraqi fuel oil were attacked by unknown assailants within Iraqi territorial waters.
Iraqi channels are now reporting that “multiple tankers” are burning in the Persian Gulf off the coast of Basra, following a coordinated attack by Iran

There are four STS(ship-to-ship) operations currently taking place off the southern coast of Iraq. This pair, filmed from a northern angle, appears to be ZEFYROS (9515917) and SAFESEA VISHNU (9327009)
Reports that an oil tanker was hit in the northern Persian Gulf tonight, Iraqi media reports a massive tower of flame off the Iraqi coast
A tanker caught fire in the Anker Umm Qasr area, off the southern oil port of Basra.

The UAE Ministry of Defense stated that its air defenses intercepted six ballistic missiles, seven cruise missiles, and 39 drones on Wednesday. It added that "since the start of the blatant Iranian aggression, UAE air defenses have intercepted 268 ballistic missiles, 15 cruise missiles, and 1,514 drones."
Saudi Ministry of Defense: Interception and destruction of 3 ballistic missiles launched towards Prince Sultan Air Base

Saudi Arabia: Three ballistic missiles were shot down heading toward Prince Sultan Air Base. The official spokesperson for the Ministry of Defense stated that three ballistic missiles launched toward Prince Sultan Air Base were intercepted and destroyed.

Kuwaiti air defenses are currently engaging missile and drone attacks. The General Staff of the Army notes that any explosions heard are a result of air defense systems intercepting the attacks. Everyone is urged to adhere to the safety and security instructions issued by the relevant authorities.
Bahrain’s Interior Ministry said air raid sirens had been activated across the country and urged citizens and residents to move to the nearest safe place
UAE Ministry of Defense: Air defenses are dealing with missile and drone attacks coming from Iran
Jet activity over Ahvaz, Khuzestan Province, Iran

Abu Dhabi Media Office: A fire that broke out at the old Abu Dhabi airport as a result of falling debris following a successful interception by air defenses has been brought under control. The incident did not result in any injuries.
Kuwaiti Ministry of Defense: We intercepted aerial targets in the past 24 hours, destroying 7 drones, and one crashed outside the threat area.
A very heavy airstrike targeted the city of Bushehr in Iran.
Footage reportedly shows the aftermath of a US-Israeli airstrike on the port city of Bushehr, the capital of Iran's Bushehr Province
Image of the Thai-flagged Mayruree Naree being evacuated this morning after being struck by an unknown projectile in the Strait of Hormuz

The United Kingdom Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO) center has issued a warning about an attack in the Strait of Hormuz 11NM north of Oman. A vessel has been hit with an unknown projectile resulting in a fire on board that has since been extinguished.  A skeleton crew remains onboard.  No word of injuries
Airstrikes target Iranian border areas near the town of Al-Siba, south of Basra.
Iran Foreign Ministry warns tankers must be "very careful"
